candidate_definition_hints.text: This is the monorepo for Spectrum Web Components (SWC), a library of [web components](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Web_components) implementing Adobe's [Spectrum design system](https://spectrum.adobe.com/).
